nasb.text: And all the people of the country of the Gerasenes and the surrounding district asked Him to leave them, for they were gripped with great fear; and He got into a boat and returned.

esv.text: Then all the people of the surrounding country of the Gerasenes asked him to depart from them, for they were seized with great fear. So he got into the boat and returned.

cnv.text: 格拉森一帶的人，都要求耶穌離開他們，因為他們大大懼怕。他就上船回去了。

ccb.text: 格拉森地区的居民都十分害怕，请求耶稣离开那里，耶稣便乘船回去了。

csbs.text: 格拉森一带的全体民众请求耶稣离开他们，因为他们十分惧怕。耶稣就上船回去了。
